```{r}

##########################################
## Convert genotypic data to Hapmap format
##########################################

data_all <- read.csv("/homes/addyhope/research/snpReady/Pop80_Filtered matrix_CR_Het.csv", head=T)

ref <- data_all$REF
alt <- data_all$ALT

# Get sample columns
sample_cols <- colnames(data_all)[!(colnames(data_all) %in% c("Marker", "REF", "ALT"))]

# Loop over sample columns
for (col in sample_cols) {
  genos <- data_all[[col]]

  # Vectorized recoding
  recoded <- ifelse(is.na(genos), NA,
              ifelse(genos == 0, paste0(ref, "/", ref),
              ifelse(genos == 1, paste0(ref, "/", alt),
              ifelse(genos == 2, paste0(alt, "/", alt), NA))))
  
  data_all[[col]] <- recoded
}

write.table(data_all,"/homes/addyhope/research/snpReady/Pop80_CRHetFilter_Hapmap.tsv", sep = "\t", quote = FALSE, row.names = FALSE)

```
